title: aeschynomene micrantha
intro: Aeschynomene micrantha, also known as the small-flowered jointvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. Aeschynomene micrantha has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powder, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
